title: Rating
description: A 1–5 star rating attached to any addressable object, used to surface user-assessed data quality and usefulness.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

targetId.description: URN of the object being rated.

rater.description: URN of the subject who submitted this rating.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the rating was submitted.

value.description: The star rating value, an integer in the range [1, 5].
